rtfreporter 0.0.22

  • Reference

    • Class systems — S3 vs R6

    • External API specification
    • Internal class design (S3)
  • Changelog

Package index

Pipe-composition API

Primary user-facing API. Build a document by piping rtf_document() through section / content / format calls, then render with generate_rtfreport().

rtf_document()
Create an RTF document for pipe composition
print(<rtf_document>)
Print an rtf_document object
rtf_config()
Configure document-level settings
rtf_section()
Define sections for pages
rtf_tables()
Add content pages to document
rtf_figures()
Add figure content to document
rtf_titles()
Assign content titles to pages
rtf_footnotes()
Assign content footnotes to pages
generate_rtfreport()
Generate an RTF file from a report object
assemble_rtf()
Assemble multiple RTF files into one

Content constructors

Build a richly formatted table or figure object.

rtftable()
RTF table object
rtfplot()
RTF plot object

Headers, footers and tokens

rtf_header() rtf_footer()
Create a header or footer object for a section
update_header_row() update_footer_row()
Update a specific row in an `rtf_header()` object

External table-object pagination

Convert a [gt::gt()] table (or a plain data.frame / tibble — or a list of either) into a list of data.frames sized for one RTF page each, ready for rtf_tables(). S3-generic so new table object types (e.g. rtables, sft) can plug in via one method.

paginate()
Split a table object into per-page data.frames

Unified column-header API

Multi-row column headers with optional spanning cells expressed uniformly via pos = 1 or pos = c(2, 5). Top-level spanning works without a separate spanning_header argument.

col_cell()
Column-header cell specification
rtf_col_header()
Build a multi-row column-header specification
add_col_header_row()
Append (or prepend) a row to an `rtf_col_header`

Borders

Border specifications for cells, rows and table zones.

rtf_border_side()
Single-edge border specification
rtf_border_side() rtf_border() rtf_border_none() rtf_border_top() rtf_border_bottom() rtf_border_box() rtf_table_border() rtf_border_tfl()
Border specification classes for rtfreporter
rtf_border_with()
Return a copy of an `rtf_border` with selected sides replaced
rtf_table_border()
Per-zone border specification for a table
rtf_border_tfl()
Clinical TFL-style table border preset

Shared table style (S3, snapshot)

rtf_table_style()
Shared table style
rtf_table_style_with()
Return a copy of an `rtf_table_style` with selected fields replaced
rtf_table_style_tfl()
Clinical TFL preset (table style)

Shared mutable theme (R6, optional)

Reference-semantics theme — mutate once, every referencing table reflects the change at the next render. Requires the optional R6 package.

rtf_theme()
Shared mutable theme (R6 — optional)
rtf_theme_tfl()
Clinical TFL preset (R6 theme)

Visual preview (S3 plot methods)

Quick base-graphics wireframes of rtfreporter objects, for sanity-checking layouts before rendering RTF.

plot(<rtf_border>)
Visualise an `rtf_border`
plot(<rtf_border_side>)
Visualise an `rtf_border_side`
plot(<rtf_table_border>)
Visualise an `rtf_table_border`
plot(<rtftable>)
Visualise an `rtftable`
plot(<rtf_document>)
Visualise an `rtf_document`

Blank-row specifications

blank_rows_by_change()
Blank-row specification: insert when a variable's value changes
blank_rows_by_rule()
Blank-row specification: insert before/after rows matching a pattern

Column-width helpers

text_width_in()
Estimate the display width of a text string
auto_col_widths()
Automatically calculate column widths for a data.frame

Deprecated

rtf_table_format() rtf_header_format() rtf_footer_format() rtf_figure_format()
Deprecated formatting functions

On this page

Developed by Yoichi Masui. Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.

rtfreporter v{{version}} MIT licensed
